MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2002 Continued To Sep-03-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 001

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jason N. Wolford, Esq. of GORDON & REES LLP 986-5900 for defendants SULEIMAN ZEIDEN AND ZAHRA ZEIDEN moving for summary judgment
Gregory J. Brod, Esq. 397-1130 for Plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Defendants' motion for summary judgment is denied.
Defendants' motion for summary adjudication:
1st Cause of ACtion (wrongful constructive eviction) denied. Triable issue of fact re landlord directing and/or authorizing co-tenants to evict.
Re Wrongful actual eviction is granted -- no actual eviction (Plaintiff did not vacate in response to notice).
Re breach of the covenant of quiet enjoyment is denied.
Re retaliatory eviction is granted.
Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II Lee Batara, CSR 3759 (AJR/301/CL)

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for defendants. Case has mediated. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Mary J. Hinds. (212)

Jason N. Wolford, Esq. of GORDON & REES, LLP 986-5900 for defendants SULEIMAN EIDAN and ZAHRA ZEIDAN demurring parties
Gregory J. Brod, Esq. 397-1130 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows:
Demurrer overruled as to Causes of Action 1, 2, 4 and 6.
Demurrer sustained as to Causes of ACtion 3 and 5.
(JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
